paracetamol_ibuprofen.description: May increase stomach irritation and potential kidney strain if used excessively.

paracetamol_warfarin.description: Prolonged use of paracetamol may enhance the anticoagulant effect of warfarin, increasing bleeding risk.

ibuprofen_aspirin.description: Simultaneous use can increase the risk of gastrointestinal bleeding and reduce aspirin's cardioprotective effects.

ibuprofen_lisinopril.description: Ibuprofen can reduce the blood pressure-lowering effects of lisinopril and impact kidney function.

amoxicillin_methotrexate.description: Amoxicillin can decrease the clearance of methotrexate, potentially leading to methotrexate toxicity.
